name: cure-cafe
description: Production-ready MVP for Cure Cafe, a hospital nutrition and meal operations platform

scripts.setup: npm install && npm run postgres:up && npm run db:push -w apps/api && npm run db:seed -w apps/api
scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c teal,amber "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
